summary: The agent reported a partial status but produced no actual output — the response field is empty. The research task to evaluate rich input field libraries (TipTap, Lexical, CodeMirror 6, Monaco, Plate) was not completed, and no recommendation or comparison was provided.

concerns.description: The agent produced no output at all — the response is empty despite the task being a research/recommendation task that should have produced a detailed comparison.
No files were created (e.g., a recommendation document or comparison matrix), and no analysis was performed against the project's actual tech stack.

humanAttentionReason: The task was not completed — the agent produced no research output. The entire rich input library evaluation needs to be re-run.

reviewFindings.description: No library comparison or recommendation was produced. The task to evaluate TipTap, Lexical, CodeMirror 6, Monaco Editor, and Plate against 7 feature criteria was not attempted.
The project's tech stack was not examined, so no stack-specific recommendation could be made.
